sourceSmoke.payFailure: Remote endpoint correctly returned HTTP 401 because no authorized Pay read key was available.

knownLimitations: Central Finance registry, persistent Gateway deployment and installed Wallet approval are not complete.
Authorized remote Pay receipt smoke is blocked on an operator-provided Pay read credential.
Explorer reports indexer lag and Finance truthfully bounds activity to the latest 100 indexed records.
The local edge Gateway uses in-memory replay and revocation state; production requires persistent shared storage.
iOS local install is unavailable because this host has CommandLineTools rather than full Xcode; CI Simulator evidence is pending.
The Android APK uses a local test signature and is not a production or store artifact.
The Web surface is a signed-out feasibility companion and has no registered Web Wallet client.
